case_title: BODE CONCRETE LLC VS. THIRD STREET EQUITY PARTNERS et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCREDE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT THIRD STREET EQUITY PARTNERS THOMPSON PACIFIC CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-20-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-05-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-17-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT THOMPSON PACIFIC CORPORATION; AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-01-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFT THIRD STREET EQUITY PARTNERS ; COMPLAINT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT THOMPSON PACIFIC CORPORATION AND DOES 1 TO 10
